creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed


I've looked into the issues that you raise in this PR. 

1. The "don't delete current distfiles" issue is valid 
2. The "distdir could be a symlink" thing is weird, bug ok 
3. I am completely uninterested in changing my code to make 
life easier for emacs :) 

I'm currently putting the final touches on a portmaster update 
that will contain fixes for issues 1 and 2 above, albeit my 
solutions are considerably different, and are rolled into some 
other fixes and improvements. Look for either a new committed 
version or a beta version for testing out soon. 

Thanks for bringing these issues to my attention, 

Doug
